message:
fix(classes): prevent double-removal of self-loop adjacency in MultiGraph

Guard the reverse adjacency removal in remove_edge_by_key with a
left != right check so that self-loops only remove the adjacency
entry once instead of attempting to remove it twice (which could
corrupt the edge count or panic on missing key).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
